name: Uptime Robot
description: Monitor Uptime Robot uptime monitors and account accessibility for availability compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to UptimeRobot at https://dashboard.uptimerobot.com
2. Navigate to Integrations & API in the left sidebar
3. Under the API section, create or copy your Main API Key or Read-Only API Key
4. Paste the API key below

checks.name: Uptime Monitors
checks.description: Lists all Uptime Robot monitors and reports their current status (up/down/paused)

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Uptime Robot account is active and accessible via the API
